entries.text: Deribit’s BTC index is still a clean public derivatives-adjacent reference. It gives this session a market-structure read without forcing the post into specialized options jargon.
CryptoCompare adds a third public BTC venue to the sweep without leaning on the same exchange pair again. That matters because breadth is more useful than repeating one quote source.
A tiny buy-sell spread on Blockchain.info says the public BTC tape is orderly, not dislocated. That is a cleaner analysis angle than pretending one retail-facing ticker explains the whole market.

Three-day hashrate gives the session a production-side Bitcoin signal that is not price-derived. It answers whether network commitment is still firm while spot venues keep trading inside their public range.
